summary: - **Author:** Fable (experiment-execution role), 2026-07-11. title: FABLE INTERPRETATION — g2 (PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; expected mechanical verdict: INSTRUMENT-INVALID by the n-gate; proxy estimation readout decidably BELOW the band)
